xmldoc.message:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Model>
  <!--GENERATE-->
  <Command Name="generate" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="TerevintoSoftware.StaticSiteGenerator.Cli.GenerateCommand" 
Settings="TerevintoSoftware.StaticSiteGenerator.Cli.GenerateSettings">
    <Description>Generates a static site from an ASP.NET Core MVC project. 
Please look at the GitHub project for more information: 
https://github.com/CamiloTerevinto/TerevintoSoftware.StaticSiteGenerator</Descri
ption>
    <Parameters>
      <Argument Name="PROJECT_PATH" Position="0" Required="true" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The path to the project containing the ASP.NET Core MVC 
website.</Description>
      </Argument>
      <Option Short="a" Long="assembly" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The path to the compiled assembly of the project. 
Automatically determined if not given.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="base-controller" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The base controller of the project.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="clear-existing-output" Value="NULL" 
Required="false" Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Whether to clear the existing output 
directory.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="default-culture" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The default culture of the project.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="default-route-template" Value="NULL" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The default route template of the project.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>The path to the output directory.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="route-casing" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="TerevintoSoftware.StaticSiteGenerator.Configuration.RouteCasing">
        <Description>The casing convention to use for routes.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="use-localization" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Whether to use localization in the project.</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="v" Long="verbose" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Whether to show verbose output.</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
</Model>

install.stdout:
You can invoke the tool using the following command: ssg
Tool 'terevintosoftware.staticsitegenerator' (version '10.0.1') was successfully installed.
